summary: No remaining regression finding: null is rejected before mutation with the SSOT-defined invalid_state code, lifecycle precedence is preserved, and current-head replay is green.
inspection_summary: Independent review checked state-machine compatibility, authority ordering, legacy paths, schema/restart behavior, performance evidence, and corrected an initially supplied non-SSOT error-code expectation.
judgment_delta: Initial invalid_stop_reason concern -> withdrawn after SSOT verification showed invalid_state is the explicit public contract; no compatibility or performance regression remains.
